user_message: I need you to process this escalation email from Contoso Ltd. We had a deep-dive last month -- need the follow-up.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Angela Doyle <angela.doyle@contosoltd.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-03 12:41 EST
Subject: Follow-up: escalation triage Review

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with escalation triage. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Angela Doyle <angela.doyle@contosoltd.com>
Date: 2024-02-04 08:13 EST
Subject: Re: Re: escalation triage Timeline

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about escalation triage. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Angela Doyle <angela.doyle@contosoltd.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-01 16:57 EST
Subject: URGENT: escalation triage Issue at Contoso Ltd

There's been a change in our timeline for escalation triage. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Contoso Ltd: there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope

handoffs.condition: contact and opportunity records need updating

usability_anchors: Score 5: Complete, well-structured output matching the Champion-Change Email Signal -> Re-engagement Plan template with all required artifacts present and actionable
Score 3: Output covers main requirements but missing one or two secondary artifacts or lacking specificity
Score 1: Output is generic, missing key artifacts, or fails to address the specific request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct escalation triage decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
